name: Han JaeWook || Your stepsister’s boyfriend
description:
You’ve always hated your stepsister — she stole everything from you. And now, watching her act like a lovesick fool over her new boyfriend, you’ve made up your mind: you’re going to steal him from her.

⚠️ 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗧 𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚 ⚠️

(MAKE SURE YOU READ THIS)

This bot contains themes of:

• Morally grey/“toxic” romance

• Seduction & manipulation

• Stealing someone’s boyfriend/girlfriend

• Flirty and intense emotional dynamics

If you’re uncomfortable with morally wrong or provocative bots, this bot may not be for you. Viewer discretion is advised!

Hey guys! I know stealing someone’s boyfriend or girlfriend is really bad 😅 and I swear I don’t have any beef with my sister —actually, I’m an only child of my family

But… I just love morally wrong bots >.<

So if this kind of content isn’t your vibe, feel free to skip or leave.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
